name: Duo Security
description: Monitor Duo Security MFA platform for user enrollment and authentication policy compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Duo Admin Panel at https://admin.duosecurity.com
2. Go to Applications → Protect an Application
3. Find Admin API → click Protect
4. Copy the Integration Key, Secret Key, and API Hostname
5. Base64 encode 'integration_key:secret_key': echo -n 'ikey:skey' | base64
6. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: Encoded Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'integration_key:secret_key'. Found in Duo Admin Panel → Applications → Admin API. Command: echo -n 'DIXXXXXXXX:secret' | base64

credentialFields.label: API Hostname
credentialFields.helpText: Your Duo API hostname from the Admin API application (e.g. api-XXXXXXXX.duosecurity.com)

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies Duo Security MFA is active and users are enrolled

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Duo Security user enrollment for MFA compliance
